<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" data-theme="dark">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Ousmane Sanokho</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Serif+Display:ital@0;1&family=DM+Sans:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..40,300;0,9..40,400;0,9..40,500;1,9..40,300&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
:root{--ease:cubic-bezier(0.25,0.1,0.25,1);--ease-out:cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1);--green:#00E676;--gold:#FFD600;}
[data-theme="dark"]{--bg:#0a0a0a;--bg2:#111111;--bg3:#1a1a1a;--surface:#161616;--border:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);--border-strong:rgba(255,255,255,0.14);--text:#f5f5f7;--text-secondary:#86868b;--text-tertiary:#48484a;--tag-bg:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);--tag-border:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);--tag-text:#acacb4;--btn-bg:#f5f5f7;--btn-text:#0a0a0a;--btn-ghost-bg:transparent;--btn-ghost-text:#f5f5f7;--btn-ghost-border:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);--card-bg:#111111;--card-hover:#161616;--divider:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);--glow:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);--toggle-bg:#2a2a2a;--status-bg:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);}
[data-theme="light"]{--bg:#ffffff;--bg2:#f5f5f7;--bg3:#e8e8ed;--surface:#f5f5f7;--border:rgba(0,0,0,0.08);--border-strong:rgba(0,0,0,0.14);--text:#1d1d1f;--text-secondary:#6e6e73;--text-tertiary:#aeaeb2;--tag-bg:rgba(0,0,0,0.04);--tag-border:rgba(0,0,0,0.08);--tag-text:#6e6e73;--btn-bg:#1d1d1f;--btn-text:#ffffff;--btn-ghost-bg:transparent;--btn-ghost-text:#1d1d1f;--btn-ghost-border:rgba(0,0,0,0.2);--card-bg:#ffffff;--card-hover:#f5f5f7;--divider:rgba(0,0,0,0.06);--glow:rgba(0,0,0,0.02);--toggle-bg:#e8e8ed;--status-bg:rgba(0,0,0,0.04);}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:'DM Sans',system-ui,sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.6;transition:background 0.4s var(--ease),color 0.4s var(--ease);-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;overflow-x:hidden}

/* ── PLUS ULTRA SPLASH ── */
#plus-ultra{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9999;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:#0a0a0a;pointer-events:none;animation:puFade 2.8s var(--ease-out) forwards}
@keyframes puFade{0%{opacity:1}70%{opacity:1}100%{opacity:0;visibility:hidden}}
.pu-text{font-family:'DM Serif Display',Georgia,serif;font-size:clamp(36px,8vw,90px);font-weight:400;color:#fff;letter-spacing:-0.03em;text-align:center;animation:puScale 2.8s var(--ease-out) forwards}
@keyframes puScale{0%{opacity:0;transform:scale(0.7)}15%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1.04)}25%{transform:scale(1)}70%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}100%{opacity:0;transform:scale(1.1)}}
.pu-sub{font-size:clamp(12px,2vw,16px);letter-spacing:0.25em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);margin-top:12px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:300;animation:puSub 2.8s var(--ease-out) forwards}
@keyframes puSub{0%,20%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px)}35%{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}70%{opacity:1}100%{opacity:0}}
/* green lightning lines */
.pu-lightning{position:absolute;inset:0;overflow:hidden;pointer-events:none}
.pu-bolt{position:absolute;width:2px;border-radius:2px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent,var(--green),transparent);animation:boltFlash 2.4s ease-in-out forwards}
@keyframes boltFlash{0%{opacity:0;height:0;top:50%}20%{opacity:0.7}40%{opacity:0.4;height:35vh}60%{opacity:0.6;height:50vh}80%{opacity:0.2}100%{opacity:0}}

/* ── THEME TOGGLE ── */
.theme-toggle{position:fixed;top:28px;right:28px;z-index:200;width:52px;height:28px;background:var(--toggle-bg);border-radius:100px;border:1px solid var(--border-strong);cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:3px;transition:background 0.3s,border-color 0.3s}
.toggle-pill{width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--text);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;transition:transform 0.35s var(--ease-out),background 0.3s;flex-shrink:0}
[data-theme="light"] .toggle-pill{transform:translateX(24px)}

/* ── LAYOUT ── */
.container{max-width:780px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 32px}
section{padding:100px 0}
section+section{border-top:1px solid var(--divider)}

/* ── TYPE ── */
.display{font-family:'DM Serif Display',Georgia,serif;font-size:clamp(44px,7vw,80px);line-height:1.05;letter-spacing:-0.02em;color:var(--text)}
.display em{font-style:italic;color:var(--text-secondary)}
h2.section-title{font-family:'DM Serif Display',Georgia,serif;font-size:clamp(30px,4vw,44px);font-weight:400;letter-spacing:-0.02em;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:48px;color:var(--text)}
h2.section-title em{font-style:italic;color:var(--text-secondary)}
.eyebrow{font-size:11px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:20px;display:block}
p{color:var(--text-secondary);line-height:1.75}
p+p{margin-top:16px}
p strong{color:var(--text);font-weight:500}

/* ── HERO ── */
#hero{padding:160px 0 120px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
/* Deku green lightning — faint background */
.hero-lightning{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;overflow:hidden;opacity:0;animation:lightningAppear 1s 2.6s var(--ease-out) forwards}
@keyframes lightningAppear{to{opacity:1}}
.lbolt{position:absolute;pointer-events:none}
.lbolt svg{opacity:0.07;transition:opacity 0.3s}
[data-theme="light"] .lbolt svg{opacity:0.04}

.hero-inner{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto;gap:60px;align-items:start}
.hero-status{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 14px;background:var(--status-bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:100px;margin-bottom:36px}
.sdot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:#30d158;box-shadow:0 0 8px #30d158;animation:breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes breathe{0%,100%{opacity:1;box-shadow:0 0 8px #30d158}50%{opacity:0.6;box-shadow:0 0 4px #30d158}}
.status-text{font-size:12px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text-secondary);letter-spacing:0.02em}
.hero-tagline{font-size:13px;color:var(--text-tertiary);font-style:italic;margin-top:24px;font-family:'DM Serif Display',Georgia,serif;letter-spacing:0.01em}
.hero-desc{margin-top:28px;font-size:18px;line-height:1.65;color:var(--text-secondary);max-width:520px}
.hero-desc strong{color:var(--text);font-weight:500}
.hero-cta{display:flex;gap:12px;margin-top:44px;flex-wrap:wrap}

/* AVATAR */
.avatar-col{padding-top:8px;position:relative}
.avatar-frame{width:160px;height:160px;border-radius:24px;border:1px solid var(--border-strong);overflow:hidden;position:relative;transition:border-color 0.3s,box-shadow 0.4s;cursor:pointer}
/* Deku glow on hover */
.avatar-frame:hover{border-color:rgba(0,230,118,0.4);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(0,230,118,0.08),0 8px 40px rgba(0,230,118,0.12)}
.avatar-frame img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;display:block;transition:transform 0.5s var(--ease)}
.avatar-frame:hover img{transform:scale(1.04)}
/* Plus Ultra whisper on hover */
.avatar-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center;padding-bottom:10px;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.4s;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(0,0,0,0.6) 0%,transparent 60%)}
.avatar-frame:hover .avatar-overlay{opacity:1}
.avatar-overlay-text{font-family:'DM Serif Display',Georgia,serif;font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase}
.avatar-meta{margin-top:12px;text-align:center}
.avatar-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text)}
.avatar-loc{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-tertiary);margin-top:2px}

/* ── BUTTONS ── */
.btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:11px 24px;border-radius:100px;font-size:15px;font-weight:500;text-decoration:none;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.25s var(--ease);letter-spacing:-0.01em;white-space:nowrap;font-family:inherit;border:1px solid transparent}
.btn-primary{background:var(--btn-bg);color:var(--btn-text)}
.btn-primary:hover{opacity:0.85;transform:translateY(-1px)}
.btn-ghost{background:var(--btn-ghost-bg);color:var(--btn-ghost-text);border-color:var(--btn-ghost-border)}
.btn-ghost:hover{background:var(--border);transform:translateY(-1px)}

/* ── ABOUT ── */
#about{background:var(--bg)}
.about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:80px;align-items:start}
.about-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1px;background:var(--border);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden}
.stat-cell{background:var(--card-bg);padding:28px 24px;transition:background 0.2s}
.stat-cell:hover{background:var(--card-hover)}
.stat-num{font-family:'DM Serif Display',Georgia,serif;font-size:36px;font-weight:400;color:var(--text);letter-spacing:-0.03em;line-height:1;display:block}
.stat-label{font-size:12px;color:var(--text-tertiary);margin-top:6px;letter-spacing:0.05em;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:500}

/* ── SKILLS ── */
#skills{background:var(--bg2)}
.skills-body{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:48px}
.skill-group-label{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text-tertiary);margin-bottom:16px;padding-bottom:12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--divider)}
.pills{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px}
.pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:9px 16px;background:var(--tag-bg);border:1px solid var(--tag-border);border-radius:100px;font-size:14px;color:var(--tag-text);transition:all 0.2s var(--ease);cursor:default}
.pill:hover{background:var(--border);color:var(--text);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.pill-icon{font-size:15px;line-height:1}
.pill-badge{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:100px;margin-left:2px}
.badge-active{background:rgba(48,209,88,0.12);color:#30d158}
.badge-learning{background:rgba(255,159,10,0.12);color:#ff9f0a}
.badge-explore{background:rgba(100,210,255,0.12);color:#64d2ff}

/* ── JOURNEY ── */
#journey{background:var(--bg)}
.timeline{position:relative}
.timeline::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:8px;bottom:8px;width:1px;background:var(--border-strong)}
.tl-entry{display:grid;grid-template-columns:200px 1fr;gap:48px;padding:0 0 56px 32px;position:relative;opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px);transition:opacity 0.7s var(--ease-out),transform 0.7s var(--ease-out)}
.tl-entry.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
.tl-entry::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:-4px;top:8px;width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--text-tertiary);border:2px solid var(--bg);transition:background 0.3s}
.tl-entry.current::before{background:var(--text);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--glow)}
.tl-entry:last-child{padding-bottom:0}
.tl-period{font-size:12px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text-tertiary);letter-spacing:0.04em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;display:block}
.tl-place{font-size:12px;color:var(--text-tertiary);font-style:italic}
.tl-content-title{font-family:'DM Serif Display',Georgia,serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:400;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:10px;line-height:1.2}
.tl-content-desc{font-size:14px;color:var(--text-secondary);line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:14px}
.tl-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px}
.tl-tag{font-size:11px;font-weight:500;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:100px;background:var(--tag-bg);border:1px solid var(--tag-border);color:var(--tag-text);letter-spacing:0.02em}

/* ── PROJECTS ── */
#projects{background:var(--bg2)}
.proj-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column}
.proj-item{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto;gap:40px;align-items:start;padding:36px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--divider);text-decoration:none;border-radius:12px;margin:0 -20px;opacity:0;transform:translateX(-12px);transition:opacity 0.6s var(--ease-out),transform 0.6s var(--ease-out),background 0.2s}
.proj-item.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0)}
.proj-item:hover{background:var(--glow)}
.proj-item:first-child{border-top:1px solid var(--divider)}
.proj-num{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-tertiary);letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px}
.proj-name{font-family:'DM Serif Display',Georgia,serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:400;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:8px;line-height:1.2}
.proj-desc{font-size:14px;color:var(--text-secondary);line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:16px;max-width:520px}
.proj-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px}
.proj-tag{font-size:11px;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:100px;background:var(--tag-bg);border:1px solid var(--tag-border);color:var(--tag-text)}
.proj-right{text-align:right;padding-top:4px;flex-shrink:0}
.proj-status-chip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:500;padding:4px 12px;border-radius:100px;white-space:nowrap}
.chip-done{background:rgba(48,209,88,0.1);color:#30d158}
.chip-wip{background:rgba(255,159,10,0.1);color:#ff9f0a}
.proj-arrow{font-size:18px;color:var(--text-tertiary);margin-top:8px;display:block;transition:transform 0.2s var(--ease)}
.proj-item:hover .proj-arrow{transform:translate(3px,-3px);color:var(--text)}

/* ── CONTACT ── */
#contact{background:var(--bg)}
.contact-inner{max-width:560px}
.contact-email{display:inline-block;font-family:'DM Serif Display',Georgia,serif;font-size:clamp(20px,3vw,28px);color:var(--text);text-decoration:none;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-strong);padding-bottom:4px;margin:32px 0 40px;transition:border-color 0.2s,opacity 0.2s;letter-spacing:-0.02em}
.contact-email:hover{border-color:var(--text);opacity:0.7}
.contact-links{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap}

/* ── FOOTER ── */
footer{padding:40px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--divider)}
.footer-inner{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px}
.footer-name{font-family:'DM Serif Display',Georgia,serif;font-size:16px;color:var(--text)}
.footer-right{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:4px}
.footer-copy{font-size:12px;color:var(--text-tertiary);letter-spacing:0.02em}
/* Deku easter egg in footer */
.footer-deku{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-tertiary);opacity:0.4;letter-spacing:0.08em;font-style:italic;transition:opacity 0.3s,color 0.3s;cursor:default}
.footer-deku:hover{opacity:1;color:var(--green)}

/* ── PROJECT DETAIL PAGE ── */
.detail-page{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:500;background:var(--bg);overflow-y:auto;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.4s var(--ease)}
.detail-page.open{display:block}
.detail-page.visible{opacity:1}
.detail-header{padding:32px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--divider);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:20px;position:sticky;top:0;background:var(--bg);z-index:10;backdrop-filter:blur(20px)}
.detail-back{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:14px;color:var(--text-secondary);cursor:pointer;border:none;background:none;font-family:inherit;padding:8px 0;transition:color 0.2s}
.detail-back:hover{color:var(--text)}
.detail-back svg{width:16px;height:16px}
.detail-body{max-width:720px;margin:0 auto;padding:60px 32px 100px}
.detail-num{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-tertiary);letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:16px}
.detail-title{font-family:'DM Serif Display',Georgia,serif;font-size:clamp(32px,5vw,52px);font-weight:400;color:var(--text);letter-spacing:-0.02em;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:24px}
.detail-status{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:500;padding:5px 14px;border-radius:100px;margin-bottom:36px}
.detail-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-bottom:48px}
.detail-tag{font-size:12px;padding:4px 12px;border-radius:100px;background:var(--tag-bg);border:1px solid var(--tag-border);color:var(--tag-text)}
.detail-section-title{font-family:'DM Serif Display',Georgia,serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:400;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:16px;margin-top:48px}
.detail-divider{height:1px;background:var(--divider);margin:40px 0}
.detail-links{display:flex;gap:12px;margin-top:48px;flex-wrap:wrap}

/* REVEAL */
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(18px);transition:opacity 0.75s var(--ease-out),transform 0.75s var(--ease-out)}
.reveal.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
.reveal-delay-1{transition-delay:0.1s}
.reveal-delay-2{transition-delay:0.2s}
.reveal-delay-3{transition-delay:0.3s}
.reveal-delay-4{transition-delay:0.4s}

/* RESPONSIVE */
@media(max-width:768px){
  .container{padding:0 20px}
  section{padding:72px 0}
  #hero{padding:120px 0 80px}
  .hero-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:40px}
  .avatar-col{order:-1;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px}
  .avatar-frame{width:100px;height:100px;border-radius:16px}
  .avatar-meta{text-align:left;margin-top:0}
  .about-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:48px}
  .tl-entry{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:8px;padding-left:24px}
  .tl-meta{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:baseline}
  .proj-item{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:12px}
  .proj-right{text-align:left}
  .footer-inner{flex-direction:column;text-align:center}
  .footer-right{align-items:center}
  .theme-toggle{top:20px;right:20px}
  .detail-body{padding:40px 20px 80px}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- PLUS ULTRA SPLASH -->
<div id="plus-ultra">
  <div class="pu-lightning">
    <div class="pu-bolt" style="left:15%;height:40vh;top:30%;animation-delay:0.1s"></div>
    <div class="pu-bolt" style="left:25%;height:25vh;top:20%;animation-delay:0.3s;opacity:0.5"></div>
    <div class="pu-bolt" style="right:18%;height:45vh;top:25%;animation-delay:0.2s"></div>
    <div class="pu-bolt" style="right:30%;height:20vh;top:40%;animation-delay:0.4s;opacity:0.4"></div>
    <div class="pu-bolt" style="left:50%;height:30vh;top:15%;animation-delay:0.15s;opacity:0.6"></div>
  </div>
  <div>
    <div class="pu-text">Plus Ultra.</div>
    <div class="pu-sub">Beyond your limits</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- THEME TOGGLE -->
<button class="theme-toggle" id="themeToggle" aria-label="Toggle theme">
  <div class="toggle-pill"><span id="toggleIcon">🌙</span></div>
</button>

<!-- ══════════════ HERO ══════════════ -->
<section id="hero">
  <!-- faint green lightning bolts in bg -->
  <div class="hero-lightning">
    <div class="lbolt" style="position:absolute;top:-5%;left:5%;width:180px;opacity:1">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 180 500" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:100%;height:auto">
        <polyline points="90,0 60,160 95,160 40,500" fill="none" stroke="#00E676" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <div class="lbolt" style="position:absolute;bottom:0;right:8%;width:120px;opacity:1">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 120 400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:100%;height:auto">
        <polyline points="70,0 45,130 78,130 20,400" fill="none" stroke="#00E676" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
      </svg>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="container">
    <div class="hero-inner">
      <div class="hero-left">
        <div class="hero-status reveal">
          <div class="sdot"></div>
          <span class="status-text">Available for internship</span>
        </div>
        <div class="display reveal reveal-delay-1">Ousmane<br><em>Sanokho.</em></div>
        <p class="hero-tagline reveal reveal-delay-2">From Assembly to AWS — I understand the full stack.</p>
        <p class="hero-desc reveal reveal-delay-3">IT student building toward <strong>Cloud Engineering</strong>. I started with machine code and worked my way up. I understand what sits beneath the abstraction.</p>
        <div class="hero-cta reveal reveal-delay-4">
          <a href="#journey" class="btn btn-primary">My journey</a>
          <a href="#contact" class="btn btn-ghost">Get in touch</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="avatar-col reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <div class="avatar-frame">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Ousmane Sanokho">
          <div class="avatar-overlay">
            <span class="avatar-overlay-text">Plus Ultra</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="avatar-meta">
          <div class="avatar-name">Ousmane Sanokho</div>
          <div class="avatar-loc">Kuala Lumpur, MY</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══════════════ ABOUT ══════════════ -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="container">
    <span class="eyebrow reveal">About</span>
    <div class="about-grid">
      <div>
        <h2 class="section-title reveal">How I <em>think.</em></h2>
        <p class="reveal reveal-delay-1">I prefer understanding systems before using them. Before I touched a cloud console, I had already worked through NASM Assembly and Linux internals. That sequence was not accidental.</p>
        <p class="reveal reveal-delay-2">I approach problems by breaking them down to their smallest parts. In networking, that meant understanding <strong>why</strong> a subnet is structured the way it is — not just configuring it. In Python, it meant building programs that actually solve something.</p>
        <p class="reveal reveal-delay-3">Now I am focused on <strong>AWS</strong> and cloud infrastructure. The goal is not speed — it is depth. I want to build things I can explain completely.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="about-stats reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <div class="stat-cell"><span class="stat-num">AWS</span><div class="stat-label">Cloud focus</div></div>
        <div class="stat-cell"><span class="stat-num">5+</span><div class="stat-label">Technologies</div></div>
        <div class="stat-cell"><span class="stat-num">2</span><div class="stat-label">Years in IT</div></div>
        <div class="stat-cell"><span class="stat-num">MY</span><div class="stat-label">Malaysia</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══════════════ SKILLS ══════════════ -->
<section id="skills">
  <div class="container">
    <span class="eyebrow reveal">Capabilities</span>
    <h2 class="section-title reveal">What I <em>work with.</em></h2>
    <div class="skills-body">
      <div class="reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <div class="skill-group-label">Cloud & Infrastructure</div>
        <div class="pills">
          <div class="pill"><span class="pill-icon">🟠</span>Amazon Web Services<span class="pill-badge badge-learning">Learning</span></div>
          <div class="pill"><span class="pill-icon">🗄️</span>S3 &amp; CloudFront<span class="pill-badge badge-explore">Exploring</span></div>
          <div class="pill"><span class="pill-icon">🔐</span>IAM &amp; Security<span class="pill-badge badge-explore">Exploring</span></div>
          <div class="pill"><span class="pill-icon">⚡</span>Lambda &amp; Serverless<span class="pill-badge badge-explore">Exploring</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <div class="skill-group-label">Systems & Networking</div>
        <div class="pills">
          <div class="pill"><span class="pill-icon">🐧</span>Linux<span class="pill-badge badge-active">Active</span></div>
          <div class="pill"><span class="pill-icon">🔌</span>TCP/IP &amp; Subnetting<span class="pill-badge badge-active">Active</span></div>
          <div class="pill"><span class="pill-icon">🖧</span>Cisco / Packet Tracer<span class="pill-badge badge-active">Active</span></div>
          <div class="pill"><span class="pill-icon">⚙️</span>NASM Assembly<span class="pill-badge badge-active">Active</span></div>
          <div class="pill"><span class="pill-icon">📜</span>Bash Scripting<span class="pill-badge badge-learning">Learning</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="reveal reveal-delay-3">
        <div class="skill-group-label">Programming</div>
        <div class="pills">
          <div class="pill"><span class="pill-icon">🐍</span>Python<span class="pill-badge badge-active">Active</span></div>
          <div class="pill"><span class="pill-icon">☕</span>Java<span class="pill-badge badge-active">Active</span></div>
          <div class="pill"><span class="pill-icon">🌐</span>HTML / CSS / JS<span class="pill-badge badge-active">Active</span></div>
          <div class="pill"><span class="pill-icon">🐙</span>Git &amp; GitHub<span class="pill-badge badge-active">Active</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══════════════ JOURNEY ══════════════ -->
<section id="journey">
  <div class="container">
    <span class="eyebrow reveal">Experience</span>
    <h2 class="section-title reveal">The <em>path so far.</em></h2>
    <div class="timeline">
      <div class="tl-entry current">
        <div class="tl-meta"><span class="tl-period">2025 — Now</span><span class="tl-place">Self-directed</span></div>
        <div class="tl-content">
          <div class="tl-content-title">Cloud Engineering — AWS</div>
          <div class="tl-content-desc">Focused entirely on cloud infrastructure. Learning AWS architecture, IAM, S3, CloudFront, and deploying real projects. Building in public on GitHub.</div>
          <div class="tl-tags"><span class="tl-tag">AWS</span><span class="tl-tag">Cloud Architecture</span><span class="tl-tag">GitHub</span><span class="tl-tag">Infrastructure</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-entry">
        <div class="tl-meta"><span class="tl-period">Year 2</span><span class="tl-place">APU Malaysia</span></div>
        <div class="tl-content">
          <div class="tl-content-title">Real Systems — Java & Networking</div>
          <div class="tl-content-desc">Built a customer management system for an automotive client using Java OOP. Designed a full network topology mapped to Malaysian cities — subnetting, routing, VLANs.</div>
          <div class="tl-tags"><span class="tl-tag">Java</span><span class="tl-tag">Networking</span><span class="tl-tag">Cisco Packet Tracer</span><span class="tl-tag">Team Project</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-entry">
        <div class="tl-meta"><span class="tl-period">Year 1 — S2</span><span class="tl-place">APU Malaysia</span></div>
        <div class="tl-content">
          <div class="tl-content-title">Systems Depth — Linux & Assembly</div>
          <div class="tl-content-desc">Low-level computing — NASM Assembly, memory, registers, hardware mapping. Linux command line fundamentals.</div>
          <div class="tl-tags"><span class="tl-tag">Linux</span><span class="tl-tag">NASM Assembly</span><span class="tl-tag">Systems Programming</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-entry">
        <div class="tl-meta"><span class="tl-period">Year 1 — S1</span><span class="tl-place">APU Malaysia</span></div>
        <div class="tl-content">
          <div class="tl-content-title">The Start — Python</div>
          <div class="tl-content-desc">Entered IT with no prior experience. Learned Python from the ground up — logic, data structures, problem decomposition.</div>
          <div class="tl-tags"><span class="tl-tag">Python</span><span class="tl-tag">Programming Fundamentals</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══════════════ PROJECTS ══════════════ -->
<section id="projects">
  <div class="container">
    <span class="eyebrow reveal">Work</span>
    <h2 class="section-title reveal">Selected <em>projects.</em></h2>
    <div class="proj-list">
      <div class="proj-item" onclick="openDetail('crm')" style="cursor:pointer">
        <div class="proj-left">
          <div class="proj-num">01</div>
          <div class="proj-name">Automotive CRM System</div>
          <p class="proj-desc">A customer management system built for an automotive company. First experience delivering software for an actual client.</p>
          <div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">Java</span><span class="proj-tag">OOP</span><span class="proj-tag">CRM</span><span class="proj-tag">Team</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="proj-right"><div class="proj-status-chip chip-done">Completed</div><span class="proj-arrow">↗</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-item" onclick="openDetail('network')" style="cursor:pointer">
        <div class="proj-left">
          <div class="proj-num">02</div>
          <div class="proj-name">Malaysia Network Topology</div>
          <p class="proj-desc">Full network topology modeled on Malaysian cities. Subnetting, routing protocols, and VLAN segmentation in Cisco Packet Tracer.</p>
          <div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">Networking</span><span class="proj-tag">Cisco</span><span class="proj-tag">Subnetting</span><span class="proj-tag">Routing</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="proj-right"><div class="proj-status-chip chip-done">Completed</div><span class="proj-arrow">↗</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-item" onclick="openDetail('cloud')" style="cursor:pointer">
        <div class="proj-left">
          <div class="proj-num">03</div>
          <div class="proj-name">Cloud Portfolio — AWS</div>
          <p class="proj-desc">Hosting this portfolio on AWS S3 + CloudFront with HTTPS. First real infrastructure deployment.</p>
          <div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">AWS</span><span class="proj-tag">S3</span><span class="proj-tag">CloudFront</span><span class="proj-tag">IAM</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="proj-right"><div class="proj-status-chip chip-wip">In progress</div><span class="proj-arrow">↗</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══════════════ CONTACT ══════════════ -->
<section id="contact">
  <div class="container">
    <span class="eyebrow reveal">Contact</span>
    <div class="contact-inner">
      <h2 class="section-title reveal">Let's <em>connect.</em></h2>
      <p class="reveal reveal-delay-1">Open to internship opportunities, cloud projects, and conversations with engineers who care about how things actually work.</p>
      <a href="mailto:ousmanesanokho74@gmail.com" class="contact-email reveal reveal-delay-2">ousmanesanokho74@gmail.com</a>
      <div class="contact-links reveal reveal-delay-3">
        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/ousmane-sanokho-8b05703a7" class="btn btn-primary" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/OusmaneSanokho" class="btn btn-ghost" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <div class="container">
    <div class="footer-inner">
      <div class="footer-name">Ousmane Sanokho</div>
      <div class="footer-right">
        <div class="footer-copy">© 2025 · Cloud Engineering Student · Kuala Lumpur</div>
        <div class="footer-deku">— go beyond, plus ultra —</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</footer>

<!-- ══════════════ PROJECT DETAIL PAGES ══════════════ -->
<!-- CRM -->
<div class="detail-page" id="detail-crm">
  <div class="detail-header">
    <button class="detail-back" onclick="closeDetail()">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M10 3L5 8l5 5"/></svg>
      Back
    </button>
    <span style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text-tertiary)">Project 01</span>
  </div>
  <div class="detail-body">
    <div class="detail-num">01 / Completed</div>
    <div class="detail-title">Automotive CRM System</div>
    <div class="detail-status chip-done" style="margin-bottom:24px">✓ Completed</div>
    <div class="detail-tags">
      <span class="detail-tag">Java</span><span class="detail-tag">OOP</span><span class="detail-tag">CRM</span><span class="detail-tag">Team Project</span><span class="detail-tag">APU Malaysia</span>
    </div>
    <div class="detail-section-title">Overview</div>
    <p style="color:var(--text-secondary);line-height:1.8">A customer relationship management system built for an automotive company as a group project during Year 2. The system allowed staff to manage client records, track service history, and handle internal operations more efficiently.</p>
    <div class="detail-divider"></div>
    <div class="detail-section-title">What I built</div>
    <p style="color:var(--text-secondary);line-height:1.8">Contributed to the backend logic using Java OOP principles — classes, inheritance, encapsulation. This was my first experience delivering working software for an actual client in a team environment.</p>
    <div class="detail-divider"></div>
    <div class="detail-section-title">What I learned</div>
    <p style="color:var(--text-secondary);line-height:1.8">Working in a team toward a shared deadline. Designing systems that real users would interact with. The difference between code that works and code that is maintainable.</p>
    <div class="detail-links">
      <a href="https://github.com/OusmaneSanokho" class="btn btn-primary" target="_blank">GitHub Profile</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- NETWORK -->
<div class="detail-page" id="detail-network">
  <div class="detail-header">
    <button class="detail-back" onclick="closeDetail()">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M10 3L5 8l5 5"/></svg>
      Back
    </button>
    <span style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text-tertiary)">Project 02</span>
  </div>
  <div class="detail-body">
    <div class="detail-num">02 / Completed</div>
    <div class="detail-title">Malaysia Network Topology</div>
    <div class="detail-status chip-done" style="margin-bottom:24px">✓ Completed</div>
    <div class="detail-tags">
      <span class="detail-tag">Networking</span><span class="detail-tag">Cisco</span><span class="detail-tag">Packet Tracer</span><span class="detail-tag">Subnetting</span><span class="detail-tag">Routing</span>
    </div>
    <div class="detail-section-title">Overview</div>
    <p style="color:var(--text-secondary);line-height:1.8">Designed and implemented a full network topology modeled on major Malaysian cities. Each city represented a network node — connected through routers, switches, and correctly subnetted address ranges.</p>
    <div class="detail-divider"></div>
    <div class="detail-section-title">Technical detail</div>
    <p style="color:var(--text-secondary);line-height:1.8">Applied subnetting to allocate IP ranges efficiently across the topology. Configured static and dynamic routing protocols to ensure inter-city communication. Used VLAN segmentation to isolate traffic where needed. Simulated end-to-end in Cisco Packet Tracer.</p>
    <div class="detail-divider"></div>
    <div class="detail-section-title">What I learned</div>
    <p style="color:var(--text-secondary);line-height:1.8">How real network infrastructure is designed at scale. Why subnetting decisions made at the planning stage affect everything downstream. How routing protocols propagate information across a distributed system.</p>
    <div class="detail-links">
      <a href="https://github.com/OusmaneSanokho" class="btn btn-primary" target="_blank">GitHub Profile</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CLOUD -->
<div class="detail-page" id="detail-cloud">
  <div class="detail-header">
    <button class="detail-back" onclick="closeDetail()">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M10 3L5 8l5 5"/></svg>
      Back
    </button>
    <span style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text-tertiary)">Project 03</span>
  </div>
  <div class="detail-body">
    <div class="detail-num">03 / In Progress</div>
    <div class="detail-title">Cloud Portfolio — AWS S3 &amp; CloudFront</div>
    <div class="detail-status chip-wip" style="margin-bottom:24px">⏳ In progress</div>
    <div class="detail-tags">
      <span class="detail-tag">AWS</span><span class="detail-tag">S3</span><span class="detail-tag">CloudFront</span><span class="detail-tag">IAM</span><span class="detail-tag">HTTPS</span>
    </div>
    <div class="detail-section-title">Overview</div>
    <p style="color:var(--text-secondary);line-height:1.8">Deploying this portfolio on AWS. Static files hosted on S3, distributed globally via CloudFront CDN, secured with HTTPS. My first real infrastructure project on a public cloud platform.</p>
    <div class="detail-divider"></div>
    <div class="detail-section-title">Architecture</div>
    <p style="color:var(--text-secondary);line-height:1.8">S3 bucket with static website hosting enabled → CloudFront distribution as CDN layer → HTTPS via AWS Certificate Manager → IAM policies configured with least-privilege access. Route 53 for custom domain planned.</p>
    <div class="detail-divider"></div>
    <div class="detail-section-title">What I'm learning</div>
    <p style="color:var(--text-secondary);line-height:1.8">IAM permission boundaries. Bucket policies vs ACLs. CloudFront cache invalidation. How a CDN actually distributes content to edge locations. Cost monitoring on AWS Free Tier.</p>
    <div class="detail-links">
      <a href="https://github.com/OusmaneSanokho" class="btn btn-primary" target="_blank">GitHub Repo</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// THEME
const html=document.documentElement,btn=document.getElementById("themeToggle"),icon=document.getElementById("toggleIcon");
function setTheme(t){html.setAttribute("data-theme",t);icon.textContent=t==="dark"?"🌙":"☀️";localStorage.setItem("theme",t)}
const saved=localStorage.getItem("theme"),prefersDark=window.matchMedia("(prefers-color-scheme: dark)").matches;
setTheme(saved||(prefersDark?"dark":"light"));
btn.addEventListener("click",()=>setTheme(html.getAttribute("data-theme")==="dark"?"light":"dark"));

// SPLASH — remove after animation
setTimeout(()=>{const s=document.getElementById("plus-ultra");if(s)s.style.display="none"},2900);

// REVEAL
const obs=new IntersectionObserver(e=>{e.forEach(x=>{if(x.isIntersecting)x.target.classList.add("visible")})},{threshold:0.1});
document.querySelectorAll(".reveal,.tl-entry,.proj-item").forEach(el=>obs.observe(el));

// PROJECT DETAIL
function openDetail(id){
  const page=document.getElementById("detail-"+id);
  if(!page)return;
  page.classList.add("open");
  requestAnimationFrame(()=>requestAnimationFrame(()=>page.classList.add("visible")));
  document.body.style.overflow="hidden";
  window.scrollTo(0,0);
}
function closeDetail(){
  document.querySelectorAll(".detail-page").forEach(p=>{
    p.classList.remove("visible");
    setTimeout(()=>p.classList.remove("open"),400);
  });
  document.body.style.overflow="";
}
document.addEventListener("keydown",e=>{if(e.key==="Escape")closeDetail()});
</script>
</body>
</html>
